title: 7.0 The Ethiopian Economy
description: Quiz covering Unit 7 of Grade 10 Economics: components of GDP, real vs nominal GDP, agricultural sector, industrial sector, service sector, and agriculture vs industrial development.

questions.question: In the GDP identity Y = C + I + G + NX, what does NX represent?

Net exports are calculated as
options: total exports divided by total imports

questions.question: What does real GDP measure?
options: The value of goods at constant base-year prices
The value of goods at current prices
questions.correctAnswer: The value of goods at constant base-year prices

questions.question: Which GDP measure is considered a better gauge of economic well-being?

options: Reducing the cost of living in urban areas
Supplying food to the industrial sector
questions.correctAnswer: Reducing the cost of living in urban areas

options: Manufacturing, construction, and electric and water supply

options: third largest sector after agriculture and industry
second largest sector next to agriculture
questions.correctAnswer: second largest sector next to agriculture
